caption: A man with a stylized, spiky grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and some apparel items. To his right and left, red and white logos for a podcast appear on the screen; one reads "BOSS TALK 101" and another says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". A black microphone is positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and moving his mouth as he speaks. The background and equipment remain static, with the only visible change being the man's subtle movements while talking.
